creator: mzs_47@yahoo.co.in
text:
Created attachment 159914
dos2unix shell archive file

Features:

* Native language support: Brazilian Portuguese, Chinese
  (traditional), Danish, Dutch, English, Esperanto, French, German,
  Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmaal, Polish, Russian, Serbian,
  Spanish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese.

*  BSD licensed
*  Automatically skips binary and non-regular files
*  In-place, paired, or stdio mode conversion.
*  Keep original file dates option.
*  7-bit and iso conversion modes like SunOS dos2unix.
*  Conversion of Unicode UTF-16 files.
*  Handles Unicode Byte Order Mark (BOM)
*  Display file information
*  Secure


WWW: http://waterlan.home.xs4all.nl/dos2unix.html
